reasoning: Koren, today's ride targets your lactate clearance limiter identified by the higher than average decline from 5-min to 20-min power. Given your recent extended rest and the need to execute a controlled start, we'll focus on enhancing your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. This session prepares you for the sustained efforts necessary for Alpine Loop climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12 minutes; 3 mins at 242W, 3 mins at 218W, 3 mins at 249W, and 3 mins recovery at 209W. Focus on smooth transitions.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
